description_long: This is a classic upright bicycle featuring a sturdy metal frame with a gently curved top tube and a single horizontal down tube. The bicycle is equipped with two large, spoked wheels, each fitted with thin tires suitable for urban riding. The handlebars are swept back in a cruiser style, providing a comfortable, upright riding position. A standard saddle is mounted on a seat post above the rear wheel, and the pedals are positioned below the frame for efficient pedaling. The drivetrain includes a visible chain and a single front chainring, with no visible gears or derailleurs. There are no baskets, racks, or additional accessories attached, giving the bicycle a clean and minimalist appearance.
description: A classic upright bicycle with a curved metal frame, swept-back cruiser handlebars, and two large spoked wheels. It features a standard saddle and a minimalist, accessory-free design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full frame geometry, both wheels, the standard saddle, and the cruiser handlebars.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width and shape of the handlebars, the narrow profile of the wheels, and the alignment of the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame structure, both wheels, pedals, and the chain mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the frame and handlebars.
